headline: White House issues 30-day Iran oil waiver to blunt global price surge
summary: Investing.com -- The Trump administration has issued a temporary 30-day sanctions waiver on Iranian oil "at sea," a move designed to inject approximately 140 million barrels of crude into a global market reeling from the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Tehran. The decision reflects growing White House anxiety over energy costs that have soared above the $100-a-barrel threshold.
